title: Xiang Family
content:
Xiang Family
 is one of the strongest families in the 
Allheaven Star System
 of the 
Sealed Realm
. In fact, it is second only to the 
Dong Ling Family
 from the time of the 
Celestial Domain
.

Xiang Family usually acts low-key but it has enough influence and power to easily defeat the 
Thunder Celestial Temple
 with the exception of 
Master Lu Fu
.

Background
[
]

Xiang Family is a branch of the ancient Dong Ling Family.

History
[
]

Xiang Family controls 
Planet Dong Ling
 and the 
Xu
, 
Lu
, and 
Liu
 families on it.

In the past, 
Dong Lingtai
, the strongest Ancestor of the Xiang Family, stole 
Wang Lin
's vitality by tricking him by saying that he could revive 
Li Muwan
. In fact, he couldn't do so and his actions only served to harm Li Muwan's already scattered nascent soul. Initially, he was going to suck all of Wang Lin's vitality and kill him but he suddenly received a message from the Dong Ling Family stating that he is to take some of Wang Lin's aura send it to them. This was due to the fact that one of their Ancestors, 
Elder Shen
, was a 7-star 
Ancient God
 and they hoped that Wang Lin's aura could help awaken her.

After Wang Lin returned from the 
Outer Realm
, he stormed the Planet Dong Ling and slaughtered the Lu Family that attempted to stop him before capturing, soul-searching, and killing Dong Lingtai. After he killed Dong Lingtai, a member of the Dong Ling Sect suddenly appeared through a portal and attempted to pass a death sentence upon him but was almost killed by a single punch from Wang Lin. He was spared by Wang Lin as he sensed the aura of the 7-star Ancient God from inside the portal.
